channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Audio Industry Executives Highlight the Growing Importance of the Philippine Market
item.description: The article discusses why the Philippine market is gaining importance for executives in the audio equipment industry. It focuses on how the country has become a relevant space for brands and companies...

item.title: Makueni student impresses crowd with viral impersonation of President William Ruto
item.description: A video from Limuru Girls High School has gone viral in Kenya showing a talented student from Makueni High School delivering a striking impersonation of President William Ruto during a school talent e...

item.title: Ontario Liberal arbitration panel upholds Scarborough Southwest nomination result after appeal by Nate Erskine-Smith
item.description: A complaint filed by federal Liberal MP Nate Erskine-Smith over the Ontario Liberal nomination contest in Scarborough-Southwest has been dismissed by a party arbitration committee. Erskine-Smith had n...

item.title: The Doors Perform ‘Hello, I Love You’ on German TV Show Filmed in Frankfurt’s Römerberg (1968)
item.description: On September 13, 1968, during their first and only European tour, The Doors recorded a televised performance for the German music program “4-3-2-1 Hot & Sweet,” part of the “Musik Für Junge Leute” ser...

item.title: Rising U.S. Treasury Yields Pressure Washington Amid Inflation, War Concerns, and Policy Debate
item.description: U.S. financial markets are facing renewed pressure as Treasury yields rise sharply, testing Washington’s ability to manage higher borrowing costs amid geopolitical tensions and domestic economic uncer...

item.title: Lokayukta directs Belagavi City Corporation members to disclose pending asset declarations
item.description: The Lokayukta has directed elected members of the Belagavi City Corporation to submit their pending asset declarations, reinforcing the mandatory requirement of transparency in public office. Accordin...

item.title: Researchers Identify Liver Protein HELZ2 That Regulates Blood Cholesterol Production
item.description: Researchers at UT Southwestern Medical Center have identified a previously unknown regulatory protein in the liver, called HELZ2, that plays a central role in controlling how much cholesterol is relea...

item.title: West Bengal Government Plans Holding Centres for Suspected Illegal Immigrants Pending Deportation
item.description: The West Bengal government led by Suvendu Adhikari has started implementing its election promise to act against illegal immigration by adopting a “detect, delete and deport” policy. As part of this mo...

item.title: How being classified as uninsurable affects insurance costs and coverage
item.description: The article explains the concept of being classified as “uninsurable” and how this status can significantly affect a consumer’s access to affordable insurance cover. It highlights that being uninsurab...

item.title: Nigerian Army Warns Public About Fraudsters Using Fake Social Media Accounts To Impersonate Senior Officers
item.description: The Nigerian Army don warn members of the public to dey careful of fake Facebook accounts wey fraudsters create to impersonate senior military officers. According to statement wey the army publish for...

item.title: Court awards R8.9 million to injured security manager for loss of earnings and medical costs
item.description: A Pietermaritzburg High Court acting judge has ordered the Road Accident Fund (RAF) to compensate a security company branch manager, Ravesh Maharaj, with R8,908,500 following injuries sustained in a m...

item.title: Atiku urges ADC to prioritise competence in 2027 presidential selection
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar has urged the African Democratic Congress (ADC) to prioritise competence, national spread, and governance capacity as it prepares for the 2027 presidential electio...

item.title: How advisors are combining ETFs to strengthen fixed-income portfolios
item.description: Over the past few years, changes in global interest rate environments have reshaped fixed-income investing, creating both new opportunities and new challenges for financial advisors. Higher yields hav...

item.title: How everyday Filipino-Japanese ties underpin Marcos’ Japan state visit
item.description: The article reflects on the deeper social foundations behind President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.’s state visit to Japan, which marks 70 years of normalized Philippines–Japan relations. While official discu...

item.title: Chinese tourist rescued after becoming stranded on Table Mountain during evening hike
item.description: A 22-year-old Chinese tourist was safely rescued on Saturday night after becoming stranded on Table Mountain while celebrating her birthday with a hike along the India Venster route. The hiker began h...

item.title: Artificial Intelligence Becomes a Major Topic at the 2026 Cannes Film Festival
item.description: Artificial intelligence emerged as one of the dominant themes at the 2026 Cannes Film Festival, reflecting how rapidly AI technologies are influencing the global film industry. According to reports di...

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 schedule, groups and host stadium details announced
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 will be held from June 11 to July 19, 2026, marking the first time the tournament is jointly hosted by three countries — the United States, Mexico and Canada. The competition w...

item.title: On This Day: South Africans summit Everest and key historical events across centuries
item.description: This 'On This Day' historical roundup for 25 May highlights a wide range of significant global and South African-linked events spanning several centuries. One of the standout moments for South Africa ...

item.title: Makati Business Club urges senators to uphold independence and credibility amid Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The Makati Business Club (MBC), one of the Philippines’ major business organizations, called on senators to maintain an independent and credible leadership in the Senate while it serves as the impeach...

item.title: Government to investigate additional nursery charges despite free childcare scheme
item.description: The UK government is preparing to launch an investigation into hidden childcare costs faced by families in England, despite the expansion of free childcare schemes. Education Secretary Bridget Phillip...
